title: Internal error with FST + multidriven conditional operators

features.name: ternary operator with assignment as condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where an assignment expression (using =) is used as the condition instead of a comparison

features.name: nested ternary operator with conflicting assignments
features.description: Code should include nested ternary operators where the condition of one ternary uses an assignment that conflicts with another signal assignment
